tasks.label: run-ios-release
tasks.command: set -e && dotnet build -p:Configuration=Release -f net10.0-ios -r ios-arm64 -p:CodesignKey="Apple Development: Tim Edalatpour (HX989MV2KU)" -p:CodesignProvision="Ben Development" ./Ben.Client/Ben.Client.csproj && xcrun devicectl device install app --device 165857C8-81A2-5628-8D8F-CD6A5B75B10F ./Ben.Client/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/Ben.Client.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --console --terminate-existing --device 165857C8-81A2-5628-8D8F-CD6A5B75B10F com.edalatpour.ben

tasks.label: clean-and-run-ios-release
tasks.command: set -e && rm -rf ./Ben.Client/bin/Release ./Ben.Client/obj/Release && dotnet build -p:Configuration=Release -f net10.0-ios -r ios-arm64 -p:CodesignKey="Apple Development: Tim Edalatpour (HX989MV2KU)" -p:CodesignProvision="Ben Development" ./Ben.Client/Ben.Client.csproj && xcrun devicectl device install app --device 165857C8-81A2-5628-8D8F-CD6A5B75B10F ./Ben.Client/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/Ben.Client.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --console --terminate-existing --device 165857C8-81A2-5628-8D8F-CD6A5B75B10F com.edalatpour.ben
